title: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 integrated across the Falcon platform
summary: CrowdStrike announced integration of Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7 across Falcon — accelerating AI-powered vulnerability discovery and remediation in Falcon Exposure Management with adversary-driven prioritization.
why_it_matters: Closed-loop vulnerability management: discovery → risk-rated prioritization → remediation guidance, all powered by frontier AI tied to Falcon's adversary intelligence.

title: April 2026 Patch Tuesday analysis published
summary: CrowdStrike's monthly Patch Tuesday analysis covered the month's Microsoft vulnerabilities, exploitation likelihood, and Falcon coverage — the kind of intel feed Technijian's patch team consumes when prioritizing the deployment queue.
why_it_matters: Confirms the patches Technijian's pipeline pushed during the April patch window were the highest-priority items per CrowdStrike's threat-intel team.
